penalties.description: The suture deviates visibly from the marked targets.
The knot slips slightly under tension during assessment.

reasoning: The suture deviation and knot slippage were observable. The final suture cut was completed inside the trainer. Lighting and frame transitions were clear, though minor angle changes limited some visibility.
technique_summary: The suture deviation and knot slippage were observable. The final suture cut was completed inside the trainer. Lighting and frame transitions were clear, though minor angle changes limited some visibility.
